task_completion.description: Agent initiated a crawl of the target website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider window is open with 'https://crawler-test.com/' in the 'Enter URL to spider' bar, and crawl results or progress are visible.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Hreflang tab or filtered for hreflang data in Screaming Frog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Hreflang' tab is selected in the Screaming Frog interface, or the main window displays hreflang-specific columns (e.g., 'Hreflang URL', 'Language', 'Return Link').

task_completion.description: Agent exported the hreflang data as a CSV file to the specified exports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal window showing a .csv file being saved to or existing in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Agent created the hreflang audit report text file in the specified reports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file manager, or terminal showing the file 'hreflang_report.txt' located in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: The audit report includes the count of pages with hreflang tags and the unique language codes found.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'hreflang_report.txt' are visible, explicitly mentioning the number of pages (should be 6) and listing the language codes found (en, de, pl, hu, jp, x-default).

task_completion.description: The audit report details specific error types and prioritized fixes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'hreflang_report.txt' are visible, containing a section that identifies specific hreflang errors (e.g., missing return links, incorrect codes) and provides recommendations or prioritized fixes.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual Screaming Frog application interface, not just terminal curl commands or mock scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not hallucinate the presence of French ('fr') language codes in the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report contents do NOT list 'fr' or 'French' as a found language code on the site, proving the agent relied on actual crawl data rather than guessing.

integrity.description: The CSV file appears to be a genuine export from Screaming Frog, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains standard Screaming Frog column headers and formatting, rather than a manually typed, simplified list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://crawler-test.com/. The site contains exactly 6 pages with hreflang data. The actual language codes present are: en, de, pl, hu, jp, and x-default. French (fr) is NOT present on the site. The report must be located at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/hreflang_report.txt.
